name: Aegis — Cognitive Scam Firewall API
description:
Complete Postman/Bruno collection for all Aegis v1 endpoints.
Import this file directly into Postman (File → Import) or Bruno.

Base URL: http://localhost:8000
Docs:     http://localhost:8000/docs

Generated: 2026-04-14

variable.description: Change to your server IP when testing on a physical Android device.

request.description: Simple liveness probe. Expect: { "status": "Aegis Backend is Active", "version": "1.0.0" }

Analyse a text transcript for scam intent.
Expect: is_scam=true, scam_score ≥ 85, reason explains IRS/urgency/gift-card tactics.

response.name: 200 — Scam detected
200 — Safe transcript

formdata.description: Upload backend/test_assets/sample_scam_contract.txt renamed to .pdf, OR any real PDF/PNG/JPEG contract. Max 20 MB.

request.description:
Upload a PDF, PNG, or JPEG (max 20 MB) to scan for predatory clauses.
Set the file field in the Body → form-data tab.
Expect: risk_level, flagged_clauses[], summary.

response.name: 200 — HIGH risk document
200 — SAFE document
400 — Unsupported file type
413 — File too large (>20 MB)

request.description: Returns the 20 most recent threat log entries across all modules.

response.name: 200 — Paginated log list
